caption.full:
Weapons prequel Gladys is in development with Zach Cregger

Zach Cregger confirmed a script is in progress for the Weapons prequel, tentatively titled Gladys. Cregger and Zach Shields are writing the script, which will focus on the origin story of Aunt Gladys, played by Amy Madigan in the original film.

Does giving Aunt Gladys her own origin risk over-explaining the mystery that made Weapons so unsettling?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #BoxOffice #WeaponsMovie #GladysMovie
caption.firstComment: Amy Madigan as a young Gladys will flatten the eerie enigma into a tired origin saga — this prequel is already a misstep.

facebook.text: Zach Cregger is developing a prequel to his hit film Weapons, titled Gladys. The new film will focus on the origin story of Amy Madigan's character, Aunt Gladys. Cregger confirmed the script is in progress. What do you hope to see in the prequel? Let us know below!

youtube.title: Zach Cregger: 'Gladys' Prequel Script in Progress
youtube.description:
Zach Cregger confirmed a prequel to Weapons, tentatively titled Gladys, is in development at New Line Cinema. Cregger and Zach Shields are writing the script, focusing on Amy Madigan's character, Aunt Gladys. The original Weapons film grossed $270 million globally.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
